query:
-- MySQL DAYOFWEEK: 1=Sunday, 2=Monday, 3=Tuesday, 4=Wednesday, 5=Thursday, 6=Friday, 7=Saturday
-- Keep: Sunday(1), Monday(2), Wednesday(4), Friday(6)
-- Delete: Tuesday(3), Thursday(5), Saturday(7)
DELETE FROM schedule_slots
WHERE DAYOFWEEK(slotDate) NOT IN (1, 2, 4, 6);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute 
-- MySQL DAYOFWEEK: 1=Sunday, 2=Monday, 3=Tuesday, 4=Wednesday, 5=Thursday, 6=Friday, 7=Saturday
-- Keep: Sunday(1), Monday(2), Wednesday(4), Friday(6)
-- Delete: Tuesday(3), Thursday(5), Saturday(7)
DELETE FROM schedule_slots
WHERE DAYOFWEEK(slotDate) NOT IN (1, 2, 4, 6);
